Related Entities

  • hospital SENTARA NORFOLK GENERAL HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • hospital SENTARA LEIGH HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • hospital CHILDRENS HOSPITAL OF THE KINGS DAUGHTERS INC
  • snf SIGNATURE HEALTHCARE OF NORFOLK 2-star, 169 beds
  • snf LAKE TAYLOR HOSP 3-star, 192 beds
  • snf WATERSIDE HEALTH & REHAB CENTER 3-star, 197 beds
  • snf Norfolk Health Care Center 1-star, 180 beds
  • snf AUTUMN CARE OF NORFOLK 4-star, 120 beds
  • snf Ghent Health and Rehabilitation 1-star, 222 beds
  • snf NORVIEW HEIGHTS REHABILITATION AND NURSING 2-star, 60 beds
  • snf HARBOR'S EDGE 5-star, 33 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
